TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Mudan Mudan a sakuwan ku Pingtung. kumud nu kalesakan, 173.85 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 78.01 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 67.38 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 4,619 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 1,806 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 4,318 ku ingcumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, Pakalatu 93%(Paiwan, Pangcah) ku kasabinawlan. u Paiwan atu Pangcah ku sakalaniyazu'. nikasakuwakuwan Mudan mala 6 a cuwen atu 8 ku niyazu'. kina 8 a niyazu'sa, Maljipa , Sinevaudjan , Macaran(śó≠śĶ∑ ťÉ®ŤźĹ), Kus kus , Pungudan , Kapanan , Anteng , Draki . Mudan a kenis " Paiwan a kamu, Sinvaudjan," i Taywan Pingtung akuwan nwalian atu nutimulan, nuwamisan micapi tu Se-ce a kenis, Pusung akuwan Ta-zen a kenis, walibayu, satipan belaw u Ce-ceng a kenis nutinylan mitules tu Mancuw a kenis, nu Taywan a subal ku satimulay a buyu' yincumin a kenis, 1878 a mihcaan i tini a kenis sikawaw tu Mudan hananay, katukuh i kaLipunan a ziday tu Ta-cen walu a mihcaan "tu 1920 a mihcaan" Mudan a kenis papikenisan nu Lipun tu itawyaay a Takaw a niyazu' Hen-cun u sapikuwan tu binacadan a kakitizaan. Kow-min a cenbu mikuwan tu Taywan hawsa uynian u binacadan a kakitizaan sasiniyazu' misakapah amisakenis patizeng tunian a kenis. Mudan a kenis tini i śĀÜśė• a subal, nu Cung-yang-san-may ikul masamucuyay . u talakaw 1 malebu depah i kaisasa, labu nu kenis izwa ku Mu-tan a sauwac, Niw-nay a sauwac, Cu-se a sauwac, Cu-se a sauwac alikit. u caledesay a demiad u kasibalian a demiad, paymihcaan tu kasienawan atu sadingsing tusa a puud palalecad icelang kunu buyu'ay a bali, muenengay a tademaw angangaan u Puyuma a binacadan, uzuma cacay kakatuud ku Aamis a binacadan. laylay Mudan a kenis i kasumamadan nu Paiwan Mudan a niyazu', Kaw-se-fo a niyazu a kasiniyazu' liwliw a pisakakwan. 1874 a mihcaaan, Lipun tu kamu 1871 a mihcaan malikid katukuh tini i Liw-ciw, u tademaw mapatay nu binacadan, satu sihitay tu amingayaw tu Taywan, nu Mudanay a kawaw, uyzasatu u Hulan malinga tu tu sibalucu' tu Heng-chun a subal atu Taywan nu buyu'ay a kakitizaan. uynian enemay a niyazu' a mikuwan, i 1920 a mihcaan a kakitizaan misumad tu lekec mikenis tungus nu Takaw Zow-heng-cung a kenis caay patizeng tu zazan niyazu' a lala', u bacu nu lala' amisanga' tungusa nu "Heng-cung sasaay a binacadan". zikuzan nu ngangayaw tu saayaway. " Mudan a kawaw" a ngangan, cunus tiniay nipalumaan tu Ye-mu-dan, pakenis nu Takaw akuwan Mudan a kenis, 1950 a mihcaan misumad nu Pintun akuwan tu, 1956 a mihcaan Tung-yuan a niyazu' makay Mudan a niyazu' a kasilac, 1969 a mihcaan Pa-yaw nanu Kaw-se a niyazu' a sakuwa, pasumad han tu Man-cow a kenis Cang-le a niyazu' katukuh ayza. a subal Hen-cung a subal tini i Pin-tung a kenis, zayhan nasingangan Hen-cung a kenis, nu Taywan hamin nu subal nu satimulanay tu. Hen-cung a sabal tulu a hekal u bayu amin a liwliw, satipan micapi tu Taiwan bayu, nutimulan nu Pa-se-hay-siy, nuwalian belaw u walibayu, uyni dada' asubal ku saamisay atu matatules tu Taiwan a subal, izaw ku nu bayuay a lahud a pasumad, u liwliw nu sumal talakaw hatu i sasa tu 800 a depah, nu Cung-yang a buyu'ay tu na i sasa sisa bali nu bayu madayum malakuit, u micidekay ku hekal nu Taywan a subal. Se-men a kasumamadan a pingangayawan "Paiwan a kamu, Macacukes" nu Taywan Mudan a kapelpel a kawaw a kakitizaan, tini i Pin-tung akuwan Mu-tan a kenis atu Ce-ceng a sakalikeluh, silaed tu Se-cung a sauwac nuwalian satipan pakala tu 3 kung-li, nuayzaay Hen-cung subal a laylay a cacay u aazihan. siwkay zikuzan nu Se-men angayaw hawsa, Lipun a hiday u sakakaay nu mikeliday ci Si-sing-cung-daw(Saigo)atu mikeliday nu Paiwan mapulung misasing, kawili nuenengay u wawa ni Cuo-ci-du ci adidi'ay Cuo-ci-du-cu-liy, tepanay nueneng ci a Si-cang, kawanay enengay tata a min malecayay. 1871 a mihcaan, Liu-ciw a kanatal u balunga malikid katukuh macapi ku ayzaay Mu-tan a kenis, Liw-ciw mibutingay a tademaw palau tiniay a yincumin han a micumud milawlaw tu tiniay a mipatay. itawya tungus misatekeday nu Liw-ciw a kanatal, nika malecad pasayza i Kahulamay a kanatal atu Kalipunan a kanatal atu paini tu Lipun, Lipun hung-tiay henay a kanatal cenbu asilawat amiculcul tu hitay pasayza i ayaway a kawawa nu kakitizaan, 1874 a mihcaan Lipun a hitay "amisaybang tu pipatayay," " mipuput tu binawan," apasayza Taywan mangangayaw tu yincumin satu u malahitayay, sakakaay nu hitay tu satipan a kenis makayza i papiculcul tu Taywan a binacadan sakakay mikuwanay tu kawaw, mikelit tu Lipun nu hitay tayni i Taywan mianing tu binacadan, Lipun a hitay i 1874 a mihcaan 5 a bulad 12 a dimiad picekulan nu niyazu' atatukus hawsa, i limaay a bulad tusa a bataan izaw ku tusa a demiad katukuh i Se-men, matena' nu icelangay nu Mu-tan a niyazu'. muwangicay a taku muwangicay a taku kakitizaan a helung saayaway a taku ayaw caay henay kapisanga, izaw tunu buyu'ay kalikeluhan kasaupuan nu nanum, nauyaan nueneng na i pabaw nu Ban-san a sauwac Taywan a binacadan Paywan a tademaw, a mikilim tu sakapahay a liwliw nu sakauzip, mukayakay tu buyu' tayzaay tu nu ayzaay a muwangicay a taku mananel i liwliw, itawya uynian aniyazu' a binacadan, tayni tunian a kakitizaan hawsa, uynian tasutasunan a lala', nu Paywan a binacadan "GUGGI", pangangan han tu tiniay a kakitizaan "kuzi", uynian akamu i Paywan cu a kamuwan uyza u kalalikeluhan kisaupuan nu nanum. Taywan i Kalipunan hawsa, itawyaay u Lipun a tademaw mikilul tu Paywan a yincumin u pasumad tu ngangan "kutji", "kutji" a cudad, tatenga uyzaan u laway sanay a imi, zukuzan nu pingangayawan, niyazu'ay a masakapahay namalilid nu Tawywan sakakaay mikeliday nu zenbu maawaw amilihiza tu ngangayawan, i niyazu'ay u liwan uyza tu dada' balakiay u tatayna u wawa ku liwan amiputput tu niyazu'ay, 1941 a mihcaan malinga'tu uyaanay tu a tasutasunana lala' "kutji" misaka tu cupu, masa nu ayzaay u tademaway nisanga'an a taku, kilul zikuzan kilul i ngangayawan malepun tu ngangayaw hawsa,milihizaan mingayaway masakapahay a tademaw,taluma' tu niyazu' hawsa maazih ku nu uzipay wama wina atu babalaki, zayhan caay pakasanga' tu nu nisanga'an hawsa u kange'lu patay satu, satusa uyni tademaw sanga'an a taku, pasumat hatu tu ngangan "tjakudji" uynian a kamu kakelul tu nu layakay a ngihah hawsa a pangangan ty "angic a taku", mala u uyaan a taku a pangangan.
S.PHON: mudan mudan a sakuwan ku piŇčtuŇč. kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, ***.** km*. (kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺinpanti **.** km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu pawr~…ĺiwti **.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, *,*** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, *,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, *,*** ku iŇč ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺatu **%(paiwan, paŇč ¶ańß) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u paiwan atu paŇč ¶ańß ku sakar~…ĺanijazu Ē~ °. nikasakuwakuwan mudan mar~…ĺa * a ¶uw…ôn atu * ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina * a nijazu Ē~ °sa, mar~…ĺjipa , sin…ô*audjan , ma ¶aran(** **), kus kus , puŇčudan , kapanan , ant…ôŇč , draki . mudan a k…ônis " paiwan a kamu, sin*audjan," i tajwan piŇčtuŇč akuwan nwar~…ĺian atu nutimur~…ĺan, nuwamisan mi ¶api tu s…ô- ¶…ô a k…ônis, pusuŇč akuwan ta-z…ôn a k…ônis, war~…ĺibaju, satipan b…ôr~…ĺaw u ¶…ô- ¶…ôŇč a k…ônis nutinjr~…ĺan mitur~…ĺ…ôs tu man ¶uw a k…ônis, nu tajwan a subar~…ĺ ku satimur~…ĺaj a buju Ē~ ° jin ¶umin a k…ônis, **** a mińß ¶aan i tini a k…ônis sikawaw tu mudan ńßananaj, katukuńß i kar~…ĺipunan a zidaj tu ta- ¶…ôn war~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan "tu **** a mińß ¶aan" mudan a k…ônis papik…ônisan nu r~…ĺipun tu itawjaaj a takaw a nijazu Ē~ ° ńß…ôn- ¶un u sapikuwan tu bina ¶adan a kakitizaan. kow-min a ¶…ônbu mikuwan tu tajwan ńßawsa ujnian u bina ¶adan a kakitizaan sasinijazu Ē~ ° misakapańß amisak…ônis patiz…ôŇč tunian a k…ônis. mudan a k…ônis tini i ** a subar~…ĺ, nu ¶uŇč-jaŇč-san-maj ikur~…ĺ masamu ¶ujaj . u tar~…ĺakaw * mar~…ĺ…ôbu d…ôpańß i kaisasa, r~…ĺabu nu k…ônis izwa ku mu-tan a sauwa ¶, niw-naj a sauwa ¶, ¶u-s…ô a sauwa ¶, ¶u-s…ô a sauwa ¶ ar~…ĺikit. u ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsaj a d…ômiad u kasibar~…ĺian a d…ômiad, pajmińß ¶aan tu kasi…ônawan atu sadiŇčsiŇč tusa a puud par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč kunu buju Ē~ °aj a bar~…ĺi, mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw aŇčaŇčaan u pujuma a bina ¶adan, uzuma ¶a ¶aj kakatuud ku aamis a bina ¶adan. r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj mudan a k…ônis i kasumamadan nu paiwan mudan a nijazu Ē~ °, kaw-s…ô-fo a nijazu a kasinijazu Ē~ ° r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw a pisakakwan. **** a mińß ¶aaan, r~…ĺipun tu kamu **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺikid katukuńß tini i r~…ĺiw- ¶iw, u tad…ômaw mapataj nu bina ¶adan, satu sińßitaj tu amiŇčajaw tu tajwan, nu mudanaj a kawaw, ujzasatu u ńßur~…ĺan mar~…ĺiŇča tu tu sibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° tu ńß…ôŇč- ¶ńßun a subar~…ĺ atu tajwan nu buju Ē~ °aj a kakitizaan. ujnian …ôn…ômaj a nijazu Ē~ ° a mikuwan, i **** a mińß ¶aan a kakitizaan misumad tu r~…ĺ…ôk…ô ¶ mik…ônis tuŇčus nu takaw zow-ńß…ôŇč- ¶uŇč a k…ônis ¶aaj patiz…ôŇč tu zazan nijazu Ē~ ° a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, u ba ¶u nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° amisaŇča Ē~ ° tuŇčusa nu "ńß…ôŇč- ¶uŇč sasaaj a bina ¶adan". zikuzan nu ŇčaŇčajaw tu saajawaj. " mudan a kawaw" a ŇčaŇčan, ¶unus tiniaj nipar~…ĺumaan tu j…ô-mu-dan, pak…ônis nu takaw akuwan mudan a k…ônis, **** a mińß ¶aan misumad nu pintun akuwan tu, **** a mińß ¶aan tuŇč-juan a nijazu Ē~ ° makaj mudan a nijazu Ē~ ° a kasir~…ĺa ¶, **** a mińß ¶aan pa-jaw nanu kaw-s…ô a nijazu Ē~ ° a sakuwa, pasumad ńßan tu man- ¶ow a k…ônis ¶aŇč-r~…ĺ…ô a nijazu Ē~ ° katukuńß ajza. a subar~…ĺ ńß…ôn- ¶uŇč a subar~…ĺ tini i pin-tuŇč a k…ônis, zajńßan nasiŇčaŇčan ńß…ôn- ¶uŇč a k…ônis, nu tajwan ńßamin nu subar~…ĺ nu satimur~…ĺanaj tu. ńß…ôn- ¶uŇč a sabar~…ĺ tur~…ĺu a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ u baju amin a r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw, satipan mi ¶api tu taiwan baju, nutimur~…ĺan nu pa-s…ô-ńßaj-sij, nuwar~…ĺian b…ôr~…ĺaw u war~…ĺibaju, ujni dada Ē~ ° asubar~…ĺ ku saamisaj atu matatur~…ĺ…ôs tu taiwan a subar~…ĺ, izaw ku nu bajuaj a r~…ĺańßud a pasumad, u r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu sumar~…ĺ tar~…ĺakaw ńßatu i sasa tu *** a d…ôpańß, nu ¶uŇč-jaŇč a buju Ē~ °aj tu na i sasa sisa bar~…ĺi nu baju madajum mar~…ĺakuit, u mi ¶id…ôkaj ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu tajwan a subar~…ĺ. s…ô-m…ôn a kasumamadan a piŇčaŇčajawan "paiwan a kamu, ma ¶a ¶uk…ôs" nu tajwan mudan a kap…ôr~…ĺp…ôr~…ĺ a kawaw a kakitizaan, tini i pin-tuŇč akuwan mu-tan a k…ônis atu ¶…ô- ¶…ôŇč a sakar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß, sir~…ĺa…ôd tu s…ô- ¶uŇč a sauwa ¶ nuwar~…ĺian satipan pakar~…ĺa tu * kuŇč-r~…ĺi, nuajzaaj ńß…ôn- ¶uŇč subar~…ĺ a r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj a ¶a ¶aj u aazińßan. siwkaj zikuzan nu s…ô-m…ôn aŇčajaw ńßawsa, r~…ĺipun a ńßidaj u sakakaaj nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj ¶i si-siŇč- ¶uŇč-daw(saigo)atu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj nu paiwan mapur~…ĺuŇč misasiŇč, kawir~…ĺi nu…ôn…ôŇčaj u wawa ni ¶uo- ¶i-du ¶i adidi Ē~ °aj ¶uo- ¶i-du- ¶u-r~…ĺij, t…ôpanaj nu…ôn…ôŇč ¶i a si- ¶aŇč, kawanaj …ôn…ôŇčaj tata a min mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ajaj. **** a mińß ¶aan, r~…ĺiu- ¶iw a kanatar~…ĺ u bar~…ĺuŇča mar~…ĺikid katukuńß ma ¶api ku ajzaaj mu-tan a k…ônis, r~…ĺiw- ¶iw mibutiŇčaj a tad…ômaw par~…ĺau tiniaj a jin ¶umin ńßan a mi ¶umud mir~…ĺawr~…ĺaw tu tiniaj a mipataj. itawja tuŇčus misat…ôk…ôdaj nu r~…ĺiw- ¶iw a kanatar~…ĺ, nika mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad pasajza i kańßur~…ĺamaj a kanatar~…ĺ atu kar~…ĺipunan a kanatar~…ĺ atu paini tu r~…ĺipun, r~…ĺipun ńßuŇč-tiaj ńß…ônaj a kanatar~…ĺ ¶…ônbu asir~…ĺawat ami ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ tu ńßitaj pasajza i ajawaj a kawawa nu kakitizaan, **** a mińß ¶aan r~…ĺipun a ńßitaj "amisajbaŇč tu pipatajaj," " mipuput tu binawan," apasajza tajwan maŇčaŇčajaw tu jin ¶umin satu u mar~…ĺańßitajaj, sakakaaj nu ńßitaj tu satipan a k…ônis makajza i papi ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ tu tajwan a bina ¶adan sakakaj mikuwanaj tu kawaw, mik…ôr~…ĺit tu r~…ĺipun nu ńßitaj tajni i tajwan mianiŇč tu bina ¶adan, r~…ĺipun a ńßitaj i **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad ** a dimiad pi ¶…ôkur~…ĺan nu nijazu Ē~ ° atatukus ńßawsa, i r~…ĺimaaj a bur~…ĺad tusa a bataan izaw ku tusa a d…ômiad katukuńß i s…ô-m…ôn, mat…ôna Ē~ ° nu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj nu mu-tan a nijazu Ē~ °. muwaŇči ¶aj a taku muwaŇči ¶aj a taku kakitizaan a ńß…ôr~…ĺuŇč saajawaj a taku ajaw ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kapisaŇča, izaw tunu buju Ē~ °aj kar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan kasaupuan nu nanum, naujaan nu…ôn…ôŇč na i pabaw nu ban-san a sauwa ¶ tajwan a bina ¶adan pajwan a tad…ômaw, a mikir~…ĺim tu sakapańßaj a r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu sakauzip, mukajakaj tu buju Ē~ ° tajzaaj tu nu ajzaaj a muwaŇči ¶aj a taku manan…ôr~…ĺ i r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw, itawja ujnian anijazu Ē~ ° a bina ¶adan, tajni tunian a kakitizaan ńßawsa, ujnian tasutasunan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, nu pajwan a bina ¶adan "guggi", paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu tiniaj a kakitizaan "kuzi", ujnian akamu i pajwan ¶u a kamuwan ujza u kar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan kisaupuan nu nanum. tajwan i kar~…ĺipunan ńßawsa, itawjaaj u r~…ĺipun a tad…ômaw mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu pajwan a jin ¶umin u pasumad tu ŇčaŇčan "kutji", "kutji" a ¶udad, tat…ôŇča ujzaan u r~…ĺawaj sanaj a imi, zukuzan nu piŇčaŇčajawan, nijazu Ē~ °aj a masakapańßaj namar~…ĺir~…ĺid nu tawjwan sakakaaj mik…ôr~…ĺidaj nu z…ônbu maawaw amir~…ĺińßiza tu ŇčaŇčajawan, i nijazu Ē~ °aj u r~…ĺiwan ujza tu dada Ē~ ° bar~…ĺakiaj u tatajna u wawa ku r~…ĺiwan amiputput tu nijazu Ē~ °aj, **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇča Ē~ °tu ujaanaj tu a tasutasunana r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° "kutji" misaka tu ¶upu, masa nu ajzaaj u tad…ômawaj nisaŇča Ē~ °an a taku, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ zikuzan kir~…ĺur~…ĺ i ŇčaŇčajawan mar~…ĺ…ôpun tu ŇčaŇčajaw ńßawsa,mir~…ĺińßizaan miŇčajawaj masakapańßaj a tad…ômaw,tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tu nijazu Ē~ ° ńßawsa maazińß ku nu uzipaj wama wina atu babar~…ĺaki, zajńßan ¶aaj pakasaŇča Ē~ ° tu nu nisaŇča Ē~ °an ńßawsa u kaŇč…ô Ē~ °r~…ĺu pataj satu, satusa ujni tad…ômaw saŇča Ē~ °an a taku, pasumat ńßatu tu ŇčaŇčan "tjakudji" ujnian a kamu kak…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ tu nu r~…ĺajakaj a Ňčińßańß ńßawsa a paŇčaŇčan tj "aŇči ¶ a taku", mar~…ĺa u ujaan a taku a paŇčaŇčan.
S.FORM: Mudan Mudan a sakuwan ku Pingtung. kumud nu kalesakan, 173.85 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 78.01 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 67.38 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 4,619 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 1,806 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 4,318 ku ingcumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, Pakalatu 93%(Paiwan, Pangcah) ku kasabinawlan. u Paiwan atu Pangcah ku sakalaniyazu'. nikasakuwakuwan Mudan mala 6 a cuwen atu 8 ku niyazu'. kina 8 a niyazu'sa, Maljipa , Sinevaudjan , Macaran(śó≠śĶ∑ ťÉ®ŤźĹ), Kus kus , Pungudan , Kapanan , Anteng , Draki . Mudan a kenis " Paiwan a kamu, Sinvaudjan," i Taywan Pingtung akuwan nwalian atu nutimulan, nuwamisan micapi tu Se-ce a kenis, Pusung akuwan Ta-zen a kenis, walibayu, satipan belaw u Ce-ceng a kenis nutinylan mitules tu Mancuw a kenis, nu Taywan a subal ku satimulay a buyu' yincumin a kenis, 1878 a mihcaan i tini a kenis sikawaw tu Mudan hananay, katukuh i kaLipunan a ziday tu Ta-cen walu a mihcaan "tu 1920 a mihcaan" Mudan a kenis papikenisan nu Lipun tu itawyaay a Takaw a niyazu' Hen-cun u sapikuwan tu binacadan a kakitizaan. Kow-min a cenbu mikuwan tu Taywan hawsa uynian u binacadan a kakitizaan sasiniyazu' misakapah amisakenis patizeng tunian a kenis. Mudan a kenis tini i śĀÜśė• a subal, nu Cung-yang-san-may ikul masamucuyay . u talakaw 1 malebu depah i kaisasa, labu nu kenis izwa ku Mu-tan a sauwac, Niw-nay a sauwac, Cu-se a sauwac, Cu-se a sauwac alikit. u caledesay a demiad u kasibalian a demiad, paymihcaan tu kasienawan atu sadingsing tusa a puud palalecad icelang kunu buyu'ay a bali, muenengay a tademaw angangaan u Puyuma a binacadan, uzuma cacay kakatuud ku Aamis a binacadan. laylay Mudan a kenis i kasumamadan nu Paiwan Mudan a niyazu', Kaw-se-fo a niyazu a kasiniyazu' liwliw a pisakakwan. 1874 a mihcaaan, Lipun tu kamu 1871 a mihcaan malikid katukuh tini i Liw-ciw, u tademaw mapatay nu binacadan, satu sihitay tu amingayaw tu Taywan, nu Mudanay a kawaw, uyzasatu u Hulan malinga tu tu sibalucu' tu Heng-chun a subal atu Taywan nu buyu'ay a kakitizaan. uynian enemay a niyazu' a mikuwan, i 1920 a mihcaan a kakitizaan misumad tu lekec mikenis tungus nu Takaw Zow-heng-cung a kenis caay patizeng tu zazan niyazu' a lala', u bacu nu lala' amisanga' tungusa nu "Heng-cung sasaay a binacadan". zikuzan nu ngangayaw tu saayaway. " Mudan a kawaw" a ngangan, cunus tiniay nipalumaan tu Ye-mu-dan, pakenis nu Takaw akuwan Mudan a kenis, 1950 a mihcaan misumad nu Pintun akuwan tu, 1956 a mihcaan Tung-yuan a niyazu' makay Mudan a niyazu' a kasilac, 1969 a mihcaan Pa-yaw nanu Kaw-se a niyazu' a sakuwa, pasumad han tu Man-cow a kenis Cang-le a niyazu' katukuh ayza. a subal Hen-cung a subal tini i Pin-tung a kenis, zayhan nasingangan Hen-cung a kenis, nu Taywan hamin nu subal nu satimulanay tu. Hen-cung a sabal tulu a hekal u bayu amin a liwliw, satipan micapi tu Taiwan bayu, nutimulan nu Pa-se-hay-siy, nuwalian belaw u walibayu, uyni dada' asubal ku saamisay atu matatules tu Taiwan a subal, izaw ku nu bayuay a lahud a pasumad, u liwliw nu sumal talakaw hatu i sasa tu 800 a depah, nu Cung-yang a buyu'ay tu na i sasa sisa bali nu bayu madayum malakuit, u micidekay ku hekal nu Taywan a subal. Se-men a kasumamadan a pingangayawan "Paiwan a kamu, Macacukes" nu Taywan Mudan a kapelpel a kawaw a kakitizaan, tini i Pin-tung akuwan Mu-tan a kenis atu Ce-ceng a sakalikeluh, silaed tu Se-cung a sauwac nuwalian satipan pakala tu 3 kung-li, nuayzaay Hen-cung subal a laylay a cacay u aazihan. siwkay zikuzan nu Se-men angayaw hawsa, Lipun a hiday u sakakaay nu mikeliday ci Si-sing-cung-daw(Saigo)atu mikeliday nu Paiwan mapulung misasing, kawili nuenengay u wawa ni Cuo-ci-du ci adidi'ay Cuo-ci-du-cu-liy, tepanay nueneng ci a Si-cang, kawanay enengay tata a min malecayay. 1871 a mihcaan, Liu-ciw a kanatal u balunga malikid katukuh macapi ku ayzaay Mu-tan a kenis, Liw-ciw mibutingay a tademaw palau tiniay a yincumin han a micumud milawlaw tu tiniay a mipatay. itawya tungus misatekeday nu Liw-ciw a kanatal, nika malecad pasayza i Kahulamay a kanatal atu Kalipunan a kanatal atu paini tu Lipun, Lipun hung-tiay henay a kanatal cenbu asilawat amiculcul tu hitay pasayza i ayaway a kawawa nu kakitizaan, 1874 a mihcaan Lipun a hitay "amisaybang tu pipatayay," " mipuput tu binawan," apasayza Taywan mangangayaw tu yincumin satu u malahitayay, sakakaay nu hitay tu satipan a kenis makayza i papiculcul tu Taywan a binacadan sakakay mikuwanay tu kawaw, mikelit tu Lipun nu hitay tayni i Taywan mianing tu binacadan, Lipun a hitay i 1874 a mihcaan 5 a bulad 12 a dimiad picekulan nu niyazu' atatukus hawsa, i limaay a bulad tusa a bataan izaw ku tusa a demiad katukuh i Se-men, matena' nu icelangay nu Mu-tan a niyazu'. muwangicay a taku muwangicay a taku kakitizaan a helung saayaway a taku ayaw caay henay kapisanga, izaw tunu buyu'ay kalikeluhan kasaupuan nu nanum, nauyaan nueneng na i pabaw nu Ban-san a sauwac Taywan a binacadan Paywan a tademaw, a mikilim tu sakapahay a liwliw nu sakauzip, mukayakay tu buyu' tayzaay tu nu ayzaay a muwangicay a taku mananel i liwliw, itawya uynian aniyazu' a binacadan, tayni tunian a kakitizaan hawsa, uynian tasutasunan a lala', nu Paywan a binacadan "GUGGI", pangangan han tu tiniay a kakitizaan "kuzi", uynian akamu i Paywan cu a kamuwan uyza u kalalikeluhan kisaupuan nu nanum. Taywan i Kalipunan hawsa, itawyaay u Lipun a tademaw mikilul tu Paywan a yincumin u pasumad tu ngangan "kutji", "kutji" a cudad, tatenga uyzaan u laway sanay a imi, zukuzan nu pingangayawan, niyazu'ay a masakapahay namalilid nu Tawywan sakakaay mikeliday nu zenbu maawaw amilihiza tu ngangayawan, i niyazu'ay u liwan uyza tu dada' balakiay u tatayna u wawa ku liwan amiputput tu niyazu'ay, 1941 a mihcaan malinga'tu uyaanay tu a tasutasunana lala' "kutji" misaka tu cupu, masa nu ayzaay u tademaway nisanga'an a taku, kilul zikuzan kilul i ngangayawan malepun tu ngangayaw hawsa,milihizaan mingayaway masakapahay a tademaw,taluma' tu niyazu' hawsa maazih ku nu uzipay wama wina atu babalaki, zayhan caay pakasanga' tu nu nisanga'an hawsa u kange'lu patay satu, satusa uyni tademaw sanga'an a taku, pasumat hatu tu ngangan "tjakudji" uynian a kamu kakelul tu nu layakay a ngihah hawsa a pangangan ty "angic a taku", mala u uyaan a taku a pangangan.
S.PHON: mudan mudan a sakuwan ku piŇčtuŇč. kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, ***.** km*. (kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺinpanti **.** km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu pawr~…ĺiwti **.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, *,*** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, *,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, *,*** ku iŇč ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺatu **%(paiwan, paŇč ¶ańß) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u paiwan atu paŇč ¶ańß ku sakar~…ĺanijazu Ē~ °. nikasakuwakuwan mudan mar~…ĺa * a ¶uw…ôn atu * ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina * a nijazu Ē~ °sa, mar~…ĺjipa , sin…ô*audjan , ma ¶aran(** **), kus kus , puŇčudan , kapanan , ant…ôŇč , draki . mudan a k…ônis " paiwan a kamu, sin*audjan," i tajwan mar~…ĺ…ôpun tu ŇčaŇčajaw ńßawsa,mir~…ĺińßizaan miŇčajawaj masakapańßaj a tad…ômaw,tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tu nijazu Ē~ ° ńßawsa maazińß ku nu uzipaj wama wina atu babar~…ĺaki, zajńßan ¶aaj pakasaŇča Ē~ ° tu nu paŇčaŇčan tj "aŇči ¶ a taku", mar~…ĺa u ujaan a taku a paŇčaŇčan.
